title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Design and scale payment APIs in Python and Go. Own reliability, idempotency, and observability for high-volume transaction systems. Postgres, Kafka, and cloud infrastructure.

title: Backend Engineer (Python)
description: Build and maintain FastAPI microservices for cross-border payments. Strong on SQL, async Python, testing, and clean API design.

title: Platform Engineer
description: Kubernetes, Terraform, and CI/CD pipelines. Improve developer velocity and platform reliability across distributed teams.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: React and Node/Python across a mobile-first banking product. Ship features end to end with a focus on performance and UX.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Train and deploy models to production. Python, PyTorch, vector search, and MLOps on GCP. Bridge research and engineering.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build batch and streaming pipelines. dbt, Airflow, BigQuery, and Python. Model financial data for analytics and ML.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Keep large-scale edge services running. Incident response, observability, Go/Python tooling, and capacity planning.

title: Frontend Engineer (React)
description: Build accessible, fast React interfaces for identity and compliance products. TypeScript, testing, and design-system work.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Own CI/CD, containerisation, and cloud cost/reliability. AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions, and infrastructure as code.

title: Product Manager, Payments
description: Own the roadmap for merchant payment products. Talk to users, write specs, and partner with engineering to ship revenue-driving features.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Drive experimentation and forecasting for e-commerce. Python, SQL, causal inference, and stakeholder communication.

title: Backend Engineer (Go)
description: Build reliable financial services in Go. Focus on correctness, idempotent money movement, and low-latency APIs.

title: Mobile Engineer (Flutter)
description: Ship a savings and investment app used by millions. Flutter/Dart, clean architecture, and a high bar for polish.

title: Security Engineer
description: Application and cloud security for KYC infrastructure. Threat modelling, secure SDLC, and incident response.

title: Engineering Manager
description: Lead a squad building investing products. Coach engineers, own delivery, and keep quality and velocity high.

title: AI Engineer (LLM Applications)
description: Build LLM-powered products: RAG, agents, and evaluation. Python, prompt engineering, and production deployment on GCP/Vertex.

title: Cloud Engineer (GCP)
description: Help customers architect on Google Cloud. Kubernetes (GKE), networking, IAM, and infrastructure automation.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Design automated test suites for messaging APIs. Python/pytest, CI integration, and a quality-first mindset.

title: Solutions Architect
description: Design integrations across telco and fintech systems. APIs, event-driven architecture, and stakeholder-facing technical leadership.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description: Entry-level role for strong problem-solvers. Learn production engineering in Python/JavaScript with mentorship and real ownership.
